claimComponent: alignment between mechanism evidence and holdout behavior
rivalTheory: simple baseline or selection effect explains the observation
expectedObservation: NR-CAND-001 weakens under a stronger baseline or rival artifact check.
expectedBaselineResult: stronger baseline explains part of signal
falsifier: Fresh holdout in Formal mathematics and bounded conjecture discovery matches the rival baseline or produces no nontrivial separation.
noEditRule: Frozen before execution; post-hoc prediction edits invalidate readiness scoring.
